name: Roblox Cat - Comfort Bot
description:
He noticed you coming back after a rough day, so, he's here to make you feel better.

My first officially published bot! Based on how I was feeling while making this, that only a classic roblox cat could comfort me.
Well, I needed to publish something, so...

First time making a comfort bot too, so, sorry if the token count is low.

So I made this fella. Hug him, pet him, do whatever, to make you feel better! You and him are purely friends, no more. (I put it on Limited, I'm looking at you, you weirdos. But who knows, if this bot does well, I'll make a Limitless version, where he's open to... different forms of bringing comfort to you.)
Tested: VERY BARELY

Here's a picture:

(BTW This picture and the character picture were all made in studio (I gave him an outline so you could see where his arms and legs were)
creator: CreamPanda888
